meaning: n.垄断,垄断者,专利权,专利事业
examples: Had he succeeded, he would have acquired a monopoly.
The company has a virtual monopoly in this area of trade.
Planters enjoyed a natural monopoly because they had no competitors.
It has an enormous demographic database that it collected when it had a monopoly on mortgages.
PeruRail invested in new trains, but even so its monopoly has been highly lucrative.
